message:
test(readme): to_timedelta_with_unit functional coverage

to_timedelta_with_unit is the unit-explicit variant of to_timedelta
(pandas pd.to_timedelta(s, unit='s')). In the prelude since fd90.218
but only name-checked in the compile guard until now.

Adds readme_to_timedelta_with_unit_round_trip — reachable via
prelude alone — that asserts:

- Series([1, 2], unit="s") → Timedelta64(NANOS_PER_SEC) and 2*PER_SEC
- Series([1, 7], unit="D") → Timedelta64(NANOS_PER_DAY) and 7*PER_DAY

Each result is matched with its expected nanosecond payload, so a
regression in the unit scaling table (microsecond/millisecond/etc.)
would surface here.

Closes frankenpandas-fd90.47.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
